kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 — Connexion avec un utilisateur verrouillé

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Locked Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Error Message Should Indicate Account Is Locked
Get Error Message Text
Get Text
kw.msg: ${text} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${msg} = Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.arg: Sorry, this user has been locked out
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User Should Not Access The Catalog
Location Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC_002 — Tri des produits par prix croissant

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On The Login Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Title Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: When User Logs In With Standard Account
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should Be On Inventory Page
Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: When User Selects Sort By Price Low To High
Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css=.product_sort_container' by value lohi.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Then Products Should Be Sorted By Price Ascending
Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Remove String
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

iter.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

for.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

kw.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'Remove String' found.

test.name: TC_003 — Ajout de plusieurs articles au panier

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Add Product To Cart By Button Id
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then Cart Badge Should Display Three
Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
